title: Excalibur | Balanced Crates Support
description: Excalibur support for the mod "Balanced Crates".
body:
# Excalibur | Balanced Crates Support
This is an unofficial [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack for the mod [Balanced Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/balanced-crates). All textures have been edited to best fit within the Excalibur style.

## Credits
- [Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew) - Excalibur Author
- [licitlettuce](https://modrinth.com/user/licitlettuce) - Balanced Crates Author
